name: magic-animated-beam
title: Animated Beam
author: Magic UI
description: Draws a measured SVG connection between two referenced elements.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils.
Made the default animation run once, added a reduced-motion static gradient, and marked the visual SVG as decorative.

modifications.change: Repointed the bundled utility import, stopped infinite motion by default, added the static reduced-motion state, and hid the visual path from assistive technology.
modifications.reason: Preserve the connection visual without a decorative perpetual loop or duplicate screen-reader content.
